DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHERMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION. SANCTIONS AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF TURNER IN THE AMOUNT OF $647, PAYABLE TO LAW OFFICE OF CATHERINE WALSH WITHIN 20 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE PRO TEM: CHARLES GEERHART, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authories; Declaration Of Catherine A. Walsh In Suppport; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA SHERMAN'S Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions is granted. No opposition. Sanctions awarded against plaintiff Turner in the amount of $647, payable to Law Office of Catherine Walsh within 20 days of service of the order. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order for the Court's signature. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
